hero.title: Discover and Connect with the Best Training Centers
hero.description: Search, compare, and book the perfect training center for your needs. From fitness to professional development, all in one place.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search for training centers or courses...

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Finding and booking your ideal training center is simple and straightforward with our platform. Follow these easy steps to begin your learning journey.

step1.title: Search & Discover
step1.description: Use our powerful search to find training centers based on location, category, price, and ratings.

step2.title: Book & Schedule
step2.description: Reserve your spot at your preferred training center with our easy-to-use booking system.

step3.title: Pay Securely
step3.description: Complete your booking with our secure payment gateway using your preferred payment method.

step4.title: Learn & Grow
step4.description: Attend your training sessions and develop new skills with expert instructors and quality resources.

callToAction.title: Ready to Find Your Perfect Training Center?
callToAction.description: Join thousands of people who have found their ideal training centers and started their learning journey through our platform.

step1.title: Create your account
step1.description: Sign up in less than 2 minutes

step2.title: Discover training centers
step2.description: Browse and filter based on your needs

step3.title: Book and start learning
step3.description: Secure your spot with our easy booking system

categories.title: Training Categories
categories.subtitle: Explore our wide range of training categories and find the perfect course for you

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We connect learners with the best training centers worldwide.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: Our mission is to make quality education and skill development accessible to everyone. We believe that the right training can transform lives, careers, and communities. By connecting learners with exceptional training centers, we're building a world where everyone can access the skills they need to thrive.

story.title: Our Story
story.part1: Founded in 2023, our platform emerged from a simple observation: finding the right training center was unnecessarily complicated. Too many people were missing out on valuable learning opportunities because they couldn't easily discover and evaluate their options.
story.part2: We set out to solve this problem by creating a comprehensive marketplace that brings transparency, convenience, and trust to the process of finding and booking training experiences.

forLearners.title: For Learners
forLearners.content: We provide a seamless experience to discover, compare, and book training centers based on your specific needs, preferences, and location. With verified reviews and detailed profiles, you can make informed decisions with confidence.

forCenters.title: For Training Centers
forCenters.content: We offer training centers a powerful platform to showcase their offerings, connect with motivated learners, and grow their business. Our tools help centers manage bookings, build their reputation, and optimize their operations.

quality.title: Quality
quality.content: We uphold high standards and only partner with centers committed to excellence.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.content: We believe learning opportunities should be available to everyone, regardless of background.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.content: We provide clear, honest information to help users make informed decisions.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.content: We continuously improve our platform to better serve learners and training centers.

team.title: Our Team
team.content: We're a diverse team of educators, technologists, and lifelong learners passionate about transforming how people access learning opportunities.
